reviews.review_description: It won't start up the story. first the downloads take forever and then when downloading ends ,nothing but a blank screen. I am using a Samsung s8 via wifi

developer_response.body: Hi, are you sure you have been looking around you when the story started? It starts with a dark scene and just one person visible in front of the viewport.

reviews.review_description: As the great granddaughter of Syrians who were in the exact same situation but in the 1900s in South America, I thank you for sharing these stories. One can’t even begin to imagine the hardships of having to leave everything you know behind and embark into the unknown. This is why stories like these are very, VERY important to be shared.

Very bad, download is extremely slow. Plus this is political propaganda that ignores the terrorist threat and the inhumanity and misogyny of Islam which is infiltrating Europe and threatening the freedom and personal safety of women. I've no problem with genuine refugees once they can integrate with a western way of life. Unfortunately most of them don't and we end up with ghettos.
You  can be somebody else.  Well directed stories and high quality.
I know this is a controversial topic, but with this app you can experience what it's like to be a refugee..  Also, there's an artistic approach to it

developer_response.body: Thank you Thomas. We appreciate you like the experience.

reviews.review_description:
The download server is so slow. And you can't exit the app without canceling the download. You can't stream the videos, so if you really want to watch, you have to spend an eternity looking and the slow download percentage. 

If you app is based on downloading videos, your server should handle high speed downloads.

Edit: I don't get why devs always blame the user. I see that more users encounter the same problem. Your server is too slow, I don't have speed troubles with any other streaming apps.

developer_response.body: We are sorry for this but Oculus allows only 500 MB initial load. High End Content has to be loaded within the app. Amazon AWS Download Server is one of the fastest out there.
